axes.fold_local_normalization: fit on inner-training observations only; apply frozen edges to validation
axes.missingness_rule: reject observation before any outcome read
axes.reason_for_inclusion: Stage-14 Phase-1 admitted causal mechanism primitive; thresholds are outcome-free cost-scale or bounded rank bins
axes.tie_handling: stable source order by (feature_available_ts,symbol,event_id); equal values share a bin
